description.en: Use when a user wants to see who has proposer permissions in a multi-sig wallet. Lists all addresses that can create proposals.
description.de: Verwenden, wenn ein Benutzer sehen möchte, wer Vorschlagsberechtigungen in einer Multi-Sig-Wallet hat. Listet alle Adressen auf, die Vorschläge erstellen können.
description.es: Use when a user wants to see who has proposer permissions in a multi-sig wallet. Lists all addresses that can create proposals.
description.fr: Use when a user wants to see who has proposer permissions in a multi-sig wallet. Lists all addresses that can create proposals.
description.ro: Use when a user wants to see who has proposer permissions in a multi-sig wallet. Lists all addresses that can create proposals.
description.it: Use when a user wants to see who has proposer permissions in a multi-sig wallet. Lists all addresses that can create proposals.

info.en: This MultiSig has {{COUNT_NUMBER}} proposer(s) who can create proposals but cannot sign them
info.de: Diese MultiSig hat {{COUNT_NUMBER}} Vorschlagende(r), die Vorschläge erstellen, aber nicht signieren können
info.es: This MultiSig has {{COUNT_NUMBER}} proposer(s) who can create proposals but cannot sign them
info.fr: This MultiSig has {{COUNT_NUMBER}} proposer(s) who can create proposals but cannot sign them
info.ro: This MultiSig has {{COUNT_NUMBER}} proposer(s) who can create proposals but cannot sign them
info.it: This MultiSig has {{COUNT_NUMBER}} proposer(s) who can create proposals but cannot sign them
